q: The bending of waves around the corners of an obstacle is an example of of waves.
The bending of waves through an aperture into the region of the geometrical shadow of the obstacle is an example of of waves.
In a single slit diffraction, the bright and dark fringes are created by the diffracted light waves.
In single slit diffraction, the width of the central maximum will be if the wavelength of light increases.
In single-slit diffraction, the width of the central maximum will be if the screen distance is increased.
In single slit diffraction, the width of the central maximum will be if the slit width is increased.

a: an odd integral number of wavelengths
